description: playboy is all about living life with a little style and pleasure, if you aren't afraid to be yourself then feel free to express your cheeky side with this stylish watch. Fashionable, feminine and the highest quality construction - you'll be turning heads for all the right reasons! Case diameter: 37 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel round case with playboy branding on it Two removable and changable bezels Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp White dial with metallic hands Playboy branding on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
